debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
induction' h₀ with n h₀ IH
  · norm_num
  · cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_le_mul]
    <;> nlinarith
